title: Leather Horse Armor Fix
description: This resource pack changes the texture of Leather Horse Armor, and fixes a bug related to it.
body:
Leather Horse Armor Fix changes leather horse armor to be in parity with Bedrock Edition's texture. This pack also makes use of equipment overlays to fix the undersaddle being dyed when it shouldn't be.

**TERMS OF USE**
```
You cannot use any of my original assets or resources for commercial use

You can redistribute my assets in your own resource pack as long I receive credit for it in a credits.txt file within the resource pack and on the page it is being hosted

You can use this resource pack within videos or live streams, however a link to my profile would be appreciated
```
Basically, follow the [CC-BY-NC-SA License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/).


**This resource pack only works in Java 1.21.2 - 1.21.10 !!!***

1.21.1 and earlier is not supported. 1.21.11 and later are not supported as Mojang fixed this issue themselves making this pack irrelevant on newer versions.
